code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> PENDING: Invoice Created

    PENDING --> PROCESSING: Payment Initiated
    PENDING --> CANCELLED: User Cancelled
    PENDING --> EXPIRED: Timeout Reached

    PROCESSING --> COMPLETED: Payment Verified
    PROCESSING --> FAILED: Payment Error

    FAILED --> PENDING: Retry Payment

    COMPLETED --> PARTIALLY_REFUNDED: Partial Refund
    COMPLETED --> REFUNDED: Full Refund

    PARTIALLY_REFUNDED --> REFUNDED: Remaining Refund

    CANCELLED --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]
    EXPIRED --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]
    REFUNDED --> [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]

    note right of PENDING
        Invoice awaiting payment
        Valid for 1 hour (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)
    end note

    note right of PROCESSING
        Payment being verified
        Transaction in progress
    end note

    note right of COMPLETED
        Payment successful
        Preimage verified
    end note

    note right of FAILED
        Payment failed
        Retryable errors can
        transition back to PENDING
    end note

    note right of REFUNDED
        Full or partial refund
        completed
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech患者记录系统画一个发票生命周期状态图。核心流程是：发票创建后进入待支付状态，然后可以走向支付处理、取消或超时过期这几个分支。
明白。待支付状态的有效期是多长？另外，取消和过期之后这些发票数据会流向哪里？
待支付状态有效期1小时，这个信息要写在备注里，并且关联到HealthTech_EMR_Sync系统。取消的发票回写到EMR同步模块，超期的则转给LabAnalyzer做后续分析。
好的，已添加PENDING状态的备注说明"Invoice awaiting payment, Valid for 1 hour"，并建立了到EMR_Sync和LabAnalyzer的终止连接。现在处理支付分支：PROCESSING之后是成功和失败两种结果吗？
对，PROCESSING之后支付验证通过就到COMPLETED，出错则进入FAILED。但FAILED有个特殊设计——如果是可重试错误，要能回到PENDING让用户重新支付。
已添加FAILED到PENDING的回环，并在FAILED备注里注明"Retryable errors can transition back to PENDING"。支付成功后的退款流程需要体现吗？
需要。COMPLETED之后可以部分退款或全额退款，部分退款后还能继续退剩余金额直到全额退完。所有完成退款的数据最终要归档到HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault。
确认一下：PARTIALLY_REFUNDED可以再到REFUNDED完成剩余退款，REFUNDED直接连到HIPAA_Vault归档。PROCESSING和COMPLETED的备注需要补充什么内容？
PROCESSING写"Payment being verified, Transaction in progress"，COMPLETED写"Payment successful, Preimage verified"。另外REFUNDED的备注统一写"Full or partial refund completed"。
所有状态和备注已添加完成。最后检查：PENDING有四个出边（到PROCESSING、CANCELLED、EXPIRED），FAILED有回环到PENDING，退款链路到HIPAA_Vault，所有备注位置都在右侧。
